channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Penn State's Abdul Carter visiting Patriots ahead of NFL Draft
item.description: (WHTM) — Star Penn State pass rusher Abdul Carter is set to make another NFL Draft visit with less than two weeks until the draft opens in Green Bay. According to ESPN's Adam Schefter, Carter will visit the New England Patriots on Monday. The Patriots hold the fourth overall pick in the draft.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, PHL 17

item.title: Paige Bueckers expected to be top pick in WNBA Draft
item.description: The Dallas Wings have the No. 1 pick in the 2025 WNBA Draft, and Paige Bueckers is set to be the top selection.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rory McIlroy wins Masters playoff to complete the career Grand Slam
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — The closer Rory McIlroy came to fulfilling his lifetime dream — winning the Masters — the more it kept slipping away. Sunday at Augusta National felt like his last 11 years in the majors, blunders mixed in with sheer brilliance. A two-shot lead gone in two holes.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: How Trump administration’s transgender athlete order affects California high schools
item.description: The CIF is under federal Title IX investigation for policies on transgender athlete participation in sports, says it is abiding by California law.
item.dc:creator: Evan Webeck, The Mercury News

item.title: US-based Original Six Red Wings, Rangers, Bruins, Blackhawks eliminated from playoffs for 1st time
item.description: The Original Six teams based in the United States have a rich history, combining to hoist the Stanley Cup 27 times. And now, they share an unwanted distinction. Detroit, Boston, Chicago and the New York Rangers will all miss the playoffs in the same year for the first time in NHL history.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Big Sur Marathon returns to traditional course after mudslide on Highway 1 last year
item.description: From the pandemic to a mudslide taking out a portion of the course last year, the Big Sur Marathon has faced a series of challenges in recent years. Persevering, though, is what runners and race organizers do.
item.dc:creator: John Devine, The Mercury News

item.title: Patrick Reed stuns himself in Masters final round with eagle on 17th hole
item.description: Patrick Reed finished in third place at the Masters on Sunday, but it was his shot on 17 that stunned everyone, including himself. Reed asked whether the ball went in.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kyren Lacy's father breaks silence on son's death
item.description: The father of former LSU star wide receiver Kyren Lacy broke his silence on his son's death on Sunday as authorities revealed more information on his death.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: If baseball's season were as short as football's, the conversation about parity would be different
item.description: Imagine this scenario: With two games left in the season, the Los Angeles Angels lead the AL West by a half-game, needing just one victory over second-place Texas to clinch a remarkable worst-to-first division title and their first postseason berth since 2014.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Jazz close out season with 116-105 loss at Minnesota
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (ABC4 Sports) - The NBA season has mercifully come to an end for the Utah Jazz. The Jazz ended the worst season in franchise history with a 116-105 loss to the Minnesota Timberwolves, who were led by Anthony Edwards with 43 points.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Thunder smash NBA record for scoring differential in a season
item.description: Oklahoma City had a regular season like none other in NBA history. The Thunder — who went 68-14 — finished the season outscoring teams by 12.9 points per game, smashing the previous mark that had stood for more than a half-century.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Fantilli and Greaves are the latest contributors in keeping the Blue Jackets' playoff hopes going
item.description: The Columbus Blue Jackets' surprising season of exceeding expectations and contending for the playoffs is still going after beating the Eastern Conference-leading Washington Capitals twice this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Whyno, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: After a wayward Sunday at the Masters, Bryson DeChambeau is 'super excited' about tweaking his gear
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Bryson DeChambeau believed his game was in good enough shape to win the Masters. He certainly thought he could do it after he leapfrogged Rory McIlroy to take the lead two holes into the final round Sunday.
item.dc:creator: BEN NUCKOLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Connor stars as Jets clinch Central Division title with shootout victory over Blackhawks
item.description: Kyle Connor and Cole Perfetti scored in the shootout, and the Winnipeg Jets clinched the franchise’s first Central Division title and the No. 1 seed for the Western Conference playoffs with a wild 5-4 victory over the Chicago Blackhawks on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
